channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Apple is bringing age verification to Texas this week
item.description: Apple will introduce age verification in the App Store for users in Texas starting on Thursday, June 4th. The move, as spotted by MacRumors, comes just days after a federal appeals court allowed Texas' App Store Accountability Act to go into effect while a lawsuit against it proceeds. People in Texas who are creating a […]

item.title: Chinese firm selling stealth 'core technology by the kilogram' to make drones almost invisible to radars — spray-on coating is almost affordable by F-117 standards, slashes reflected radar power by 50%
item.description: A Chinese firm has developed a spray-on coating capable of cutting reflected radar power by 50%

item.title: How to watch NBA Finals 2026: Free streams, schedule, TV channels for New York Knicks vs San Antonio Spurs
item.description: All the ways to watch NBA Finals 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with Victor Wembanyama set to light up the Knicks vs Spurs series.

item.title: 'Significantly advance future Army capabilities': US Army keen on quantum control research that promises to deliver a huge leap in future energy generation and computing
item.description: US Army-funded researchers are investigating quantum vibrations in ultrathin materials that could influence future computing, communications and energy technologies.

item.title: WiiM expands its whole-home ecosystem with a new soundbar
item.description: WiiM, the audio company that's challenged the idea that audiophile-level performance requires a small loan, is expanding its whole-home ecosystem with the WiiM Bar, which releases in July. Much like its other speakers and audio components, the WiiM Bar supports a bunch of streaming options and expandability at an affordable price - in this case, […]...

item.title: Persona 5 Royal is one of many additions to Xbox Game Pass for June
item.description: The subscription is also getting some indie projects that are worth a look.

item.title: You can make the hyper-violence in Marvel's Wolverine more PG-13, if you want to
item.description: And Robert Rodriguez wept.

item.title: Alice and Steve review: Nicola Walker is the best thing about this complicated, feud-filled Hulu comedy series
item.description: Alice and Steve is a new Hulu comedy series that feels just as divisive as its central plot.

item.title: On a trouvé le vidéoprojecteur Google TV compact idéal pour vos soirées cinéma à petit prix
item.description: À la recherche d'une solution simple et abordable pour projeter vos films préférés en grand format ? Le Xiaomi Smart Projector L1 Pro est actuellement affiché à un prix inédit de 170,60 euros au lieu de 199,99 euros chez Aliexpress grâce à l'application d'un code promotionnel.

item.title: Defense tech is flooded with money, but who’s built to last?
item.description: Defense tech is red hot right now. Anduril and Mach Industries just doubled and quadrupled their valuations, respectively, and the U.S. government is proposing a 40% increase in defense budget. A wave of new startups is chasing those government contracts, but according to Ross Fubini, the venture investor who wrote Anduril’s first check, most of them will get lost in the Valley of Death between prototype contract […]...

item.title: Gemini Go débarque sur Android Go et enterre Assistant Go pour de bon
item.description: Google enterre Assistant Go et le remplace par Gemini Go sur les smartphones d'entrée de gamme. La dernière poche de résistance de l'ancien assistant vient de tomber.

item.title: A NASA orbiter around Mars suffered an abrupt demise
item.description: NASA announced June 3 it will decommission its Mars orbiter, Maven, after a mysterious December incident sent it tumbling through space.

item.title: Oil prices inch back toward $100 as U.S. stocks retreat from records
item.description: Stocks remain near their records, even with all the pressure on the global economy created by higher inflation. Oil prices rose Wednesday following the latest flare-up in fighting to threaten the U.S.-Iran ceasefire, and U.S. stocks retreated from their records.

item.title: Uber to put 500 data-collection vehicles on the road this year
item.description: The modified Ioniq 5 will be loaded with sensors to capture data for Uber's new AV Labs division.

item.title: AI is getting too much of the blame for graduate hiring prospects, and there could be a job perk that is actually behind it all
item.description: New York Federal Reserve Bank data shows that graduate unemployment started rising before AI was really a thing.

item.title: Best Buy launches a huge Sonos sale ahead of the World Cup — here are the 7 top-rated soundbars and speakers I'd buy
item.description: I've searched through the big Sonos sale at Best Buy and picked out the 7 deals on speakers, soundbars, and headphones that I'd recommend if you're looking for a home audio upgrade for the World Cup.

item.title: Nvidia is already planning N2X and N3X chips — the goal is the Star Trek computer
item.description: Just in case you were wondering, Nvidia's RTX Spark isn't supposed to be a one-off. The company is not just flirting with becoming the fifth high-profile vendor of consumer laptop chips to see if people bite. At Computex 2026 in Taipei, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed at least two additional generations of RTX Spark are […]

item.title: On a trouvé la console rétro portable parfaite pour faire tourner absolument tous vos jeux
item.description: Amateurs de rétrogaming et d'émulation, la console haut de gamme Anbernic RG557 s'offre une réduction bienvenue sur Aliexpress. Habituellement proposée à 349 euros, cette machine sous Android 14 passe temporairement à 292,71 euros.

item.title: Garmin's big software update is inbound, but these older watches will miss out — see if your Forerunner, Fenix, or Vivoactive is on the list
item.description: Owners of relatively recent Garmin watches may be disappointed to learn that they don't get the new features in the Q2 update.

item.title: 246 € au lieu de 449,90 € : la très solide GoPro HERO13 Black perd plus de 200 €
item.description: La GoPro HERO13 Black s’impose comme l’action cam de référence pour immortaliser vos sessions sportives les plus intenses. Habituellement vendue à 449,90 euros, la petite caméra haut de gamme s’affiche en ce moment à seulement 246 euros chez AliExpress.
